  1217	                    + _query_plan_contract(retrieval_plan)
  1218	                    + "\n\n## Rules\n" + rules
  1219	                    + _citation_contract()
  1220	                )
  1221	            elif retrieval_strategy == "document_summary_context":
  1222	                system_prompt = (
  1223	                    "You are a document analysis assistant. The user is asking for a broad, whole-document summary.\n\n"
  1224	                    + SYSTEM_PROMPT_META_RULE
  1225	                    + "## Document Coverage Excerpts\n"
  1226	                    + (
  1227	                        "\n".join(numbered_chunks)
  1228	                        if numbered_chunks
  1229	                        else "(none)"
  1230	                    )
  1231	                    + "\n\n## Summary Rules\n"
  1232	                    + "1. Treat these excerpts as representative coverage selected across the document, not as semantic search results for a narrow question.\n"
  1233	                    + "2. Do NOT say the user's ready document is not a complete document merely because the context is excerpted.\n"
  1234	                    + "3. Produce a useful document-level summary with clear headings, key points, and important caveats when supported.\n"
  1235	                    + "4. If coverage is incomplete, say the answer is based on the cited representative sections instead of refusing.\n"
  1236	                    + "5. Cite every factual paragraph or bullet using the excerpt numbers listed above.\n"
  1237	                    + "6. Your response language MUST match the language of the user's question.\n"
  1238	                    + _citation_contract()
  1239	                )
  1240	            else:
  1241	                system_prompt = (
  1242	                    "You are a document analysis assistant. Answer the user's question based on the following document excerpts.\n\n"
  1243	                    + SYSTEM_PROMPT_META_RULE
  1244	                    + "## Document Excerpts\n"
  1245	                    + ("\n".join(numbered_chunks) if numbered_chunks else "(none)")
  1246	                    + _retrieval_quality_contract(retrieval_evaluation, retrieval_strategy)
  1247	                    + _query_plan_contract(retrieval_plan)
  1248	                    + "\n\n## Rules\n" + rules
  1249	                    + _citation_contract()
  1250	                )
  1251	
  1252	            # Inject custom instructions if present
  1253	            if doc and doc.custom_instructions:
  1254	                system_prompt += (
  1255	                    "\n## Custom Instructions\n"
  1256	                    "The user has provided the following custom instructions for this document. Follow them:\n"
  1257	                    + doc.custom_instructions + "\n"
  1258	                )
  1259	
  1260	            # Inject domain-specific rules (legal/academic mode overlay)
  1261	            # Frontend always sends domain_mode: null (default) or "legal"/"academic"
  1262	            # domain_mode=None means Default (no extra rules), string means apply rules
  1263	            if domain_mode:
  1264	                from app.core.model_profiles import DOMAIN_RULES
  1265	                domain_rules = DOMAIN_RULES.get(domain_mode)
  1266	                if domain_rules:
  1267	                    base_rule_count = len(rules.strip().split('\n'))
  1268	                    domain_rules_text = f"\n\n## {domain_mode.title()} Mode Rules\n"
  1269	                    for i, rule in enumerate(domain_rules, start=base_rule_count + 1):
  1270	                        domain_rules_text += f"{i}. {rule}\n"
  1271	                    system_prompt += domain_rules_text
  1272	
  1273	            # Persist domain_mode to session (null clears, string sets)
  1274	            if domain_mode != session_obj.domain_mode:
  1275	                session_obj.domain_mode = domain_mode
  1276	                await db.commit()
  1277	
  1278	        except Exception as e:
  1279	            if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
  1280	                try:
  1281	                    await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
  1282	                    settled = True
  1283	                except Exception:
  1284	                    logger.exception(
  1285	                        "Failed to refund pre-debited credits during chat setup failure for user %s",
  1286	                        user.id,
  1287	                    )
  1288	            yield _safe_sse("error", setup_error_code, e, session_id=str(session_id))
  1289	            return
  1290	
  1291	        # 6) Stream from the configured OpenAI-compatible LLM provider
  1292	        try:
  1293	            client = _get_llm_client(effective_model)
  1294	        except Exception as e:
  1295	            if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
  1296	                try:
  1297	                    await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
  1298	                    settled = True
  1299	                except Exception:
  1300	                    logger.exception(
  1301	                        "Failed to refund pre-debited credits before LLM client setup for user %s",
  1302	                        user.id,
  1303	                    )
  1304	            yield _safe_sse("error", "LLM_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
  1305	            return
  1306	
  1307	        # Build OpenAI-format messages (system + history)
  1308	        # cache_control is Anthropic-specific — only include for Anthropic models
  1309	        profile = get_model_profile(effective_model)
  1310	        if profile.supports_cache_control:
  1311	            sys_msg: dict = {
  1312	                "role": "system",
  1313	                "content": [
  1314	                    {
  1315	                        "type": "text",
  1316	                        "text": system_prompt,
  1317	                        "cache_control": {"type": "ephemeral"},
  1318	                    }
  1319	                ],
  1320	            }
  1321	        else:
  1322	            sys_msg = {"role": "system", "content": system_prompt}
  1323	        openai_messages = [sys_msg] + claude_messages
  1324	
  1325	        assistant_text_parts: List[str] = []
  1326	        citations: List[dict] = []
  1327	        fsm = RefParserFSM(chunk_map)
  1328	
  1329	        last_ping = time.monotonic()
  1330	        prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None
  1331	        output_tokens: Optional[int] = None
  1332	        llm_start = time.time()
  1333	        first_token_logged = False
  1334	        token_count = 0
  1335	        finish_reason: Optional[str] = None
  1336	        asst_msg: Optional[Message] = None
  1337	        repair_metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None
  1338	        persisted = False
  1339	        settled = False
  1340	        done_emitted = False
  1341	
  1342	        try:
  1343	            try:
  1344	                create_kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {
  1345	                    "model": effective_model,
  1346	                    "max_tokens": profile.max_tokens,
  1347	                    "temperature": profile.temperature,
  1348	                    "messages": openai_messages,
  1349	                    "stream": True,
  1350	                }
  1351	                if profile.supports_stream_options:
  1352	                    create_kwargs["stream_options"] = {"include_usage": True}
  1353	                _apply_provider_options(create_kwargs, effective_model)
  1354	                stream = await client.chat.completions.create(**create_kwargs)
  1355	
  1356	                async for chunk in stream:
  1357	                    # Extract text delta
  1358	                    if chunk.choices and chunk.choices[0].delta.content:
  1359	                        text = chunk.choices[0].delta.content
  1360	                        token_count += 1
  1361	                        if not first_token_logged:
  1362	                            first_token_logged = True
  1363	                            latency = time.time() - llm_start
  1364	                            logger.info("LLM first_token_latency=%.2fs model=%s", latency, effective_model)
  1365	                        # 7) Feed FSM and emit events
  1366	                        for ev in fsm.feed(text):
  1367	                            if ev["event"] == "token":
  1368	                                assistant_text_parts.append(ev["data"]["text"])
  1369	                            elif ev["event"] == "citation":
  1370	                                citations.append(ev["data"])
  1371	                            yield ev
  1372	
  1373	                    # Track finish_reason from choices
  1374	                    if chunk.choices and chunk.choices[0].finish_reason:
  1375	                        finish_reason = chunk.choices[0].finish_reason
  1376	
  1377	                    # Extract usage if present (last chunk)
  1378	                    if hasattr(chunk, "usage") and chunk.usage:
  1379	                        prompt_tokens = getattr(chunk.usage, "prompt_tokens", None)
  1380	                        output_tokens = getattr(chunk.usage, "completion_tokens", None)
  1381	
  1382	                    # Ping every 15 seconds
  1383	                    now = time.monotonic()
  1384	                    if now - last_ping >= 15.0:
  1385	                        yield sse("ping", {})
  1386	                        last_ping = now
  1387	
  1388	                # Flush at stream end
  1389	                for ev in fsm.flush():
  1390	                    if ev["event"] == "token":
  1391	                        assistant_text_parts.append(ev["data"]["text"])
  1392	                    yield ev
  1393	
  1394	                if not citations:
  1395	                    assistant_snapshot = "".join(assistant_text_parts)
  1396	                    fallback_citations = _fallback_citations(assistant_snapshot, chunk_map)
  1397	                    if fallback_citations:
  1398	                        logger.warning(
  1399	                            "LLM emitted no citation markers; generated %d fallback citations model=%s",
  1400	                            len(fallback_citations),
  1401	                            effective_model,
  1402	                        )
  1403	                        for citation in fallback_citations:
  1404	                            citations.append(citation)
  1405	                            yield sse("citation", citation)
  1406	
  1407	                # Warn if response was truncated due to token limit
  1408	                if finish_reason == "length":
  1409	                    logger.warning(
  1410	                        "LLM response truncated (finish_reason=length) model=%s max_tokens=%d output_tokens=%s",
  1411	                        effective_model, profile.max_tokens, output_tokens,
  1412	                    )
  1413	                    yield sse("truncated", {"reason": "max_tokens"})
  1414	
  1415	                total_time = time.time() - llm_start
  1416	                final_token_count = int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else token_count
  1417	                logger.info(
  1418	                    "LLM total_latency=%.2fs tokens=%d model=%s",
  1419	                    total_time,
  1420	                    final_token_count,
  1421	                    effective_model,
  1422	                )
  1423	
  1424	            except Exception as e:
  1425	                # Refund pre-debited credits on LLM failure: restore balance and remove ledger entry
  1426	                if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
  1427	                    try:
  1428	                        await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
  1429	                        settled = True
  1430	                    except Exception:
  1431	                        logger.exception(
  1432	                            "Failed to refund pre-debited credits after LLM error for user %s",
  1433	                            user.id,
  1434	                        )
  1435	                yield _safe_sse("error", "LLM_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
  1436	                return
  1437	
  1438	            # 9) Save assistant draft before verification/repair (A2)
  1439	            assistant_text = "".join(assistant_text_parts)
  1440	            try:
  1441	                asst_msg = Message(
  1442	                    session_id=session_id,
  1443	                    role="assistant",
  1444	                    content=assistant_text,
  1445	                    citations=citations or None,
  1446	                    prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
  1447	                    output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
  1448	                )
  1449	                db.add(asst_msg)
  1450	                await db.commit()
  1451	                persisted = True
  1452	            except Exception:
  1453	                await db.rollback()
  1454	                if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
  1455	                    try:
  1456	                        await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
  1457	                        settled = True
  1458	                    except Exception:
  1459	                        logger.exception(
  1460	                            "Failed to refund pre-debited credits after PERSIST_FAILED for user %s",
  1461	                            user.id,
  1462	                        )
  1463	                yield sse("error", {"code": "PERSIST_FAILED", "message": "Failed to save response"})
  1464	                return
  1465	
  1466	            verification_report = claim_verifier_service.verify(
  1467	                assistant_text,
  1468	                citations,
  1469	                set(chunk_map.keys()),
  1470	                retrieved_count=len(chunk_map),
  1471	            )
  1472	            verification_payload = verification_report.to_payload()
  1473	            if verification_report.status != "pass" and finish_reason != "length":
  1474	                yield sse("tool_status", {"message": "Checking citation support..."})
  1475	                repair = await _try_repair_rag_answer(
  1476	                    client=client,
  1477	                    model=effective_model,
  1478	                    profile=profile,
  1479	                    user_message=user_message,
  1480	                    assistant_text=assistant_text,
  1481	                    citations=citations,
  1482	                    chunk_map=chunk_map,
  1483	                    numbered_chunks=numbered_chunks,
  1484	                    verification=verification_payload,
  1485	                    locale=locale,
  1486	                )
  1487	                if repair is not None:
  1488	                    repair_metadata = repair.metadata
  1489	                    if repair.prompt_tokens:
  1490	                        prompt_tokens = int(prompt_tokens or 0) + repair.prompt_tokens
  1491	                    if repair.output_tokens:
  1492	                        output_tokens = int(output_tokens or 0) + repair.output_tokens
  1493	                    if repair.applied:
  1494	                        assistant_text = repair.text
  1495	                        citations = repair.citations
  1496	                        verification_payload = repair.verification
  1497	                        verification_report = claim_verifier_service.verify(
  1498	                            assistant_text,
  1499	                            citations,
  1500	                            set(chunk_map.keys()),
  1501	                            retrieved_count=len(chunk_map),
  1502	                        )
  1503	                        verification_payload = verification_report.to_payload()
  1504	                        yield sse(
  1505	                            "answer_repaired",
  1506	                            {
  1507	                                "text": assistant_text,
  1508	                                "citations": citations,
  1509	                                "verification": verification_payload,
  1510	                            },
  1511	                        )
  1512	            if verification_report.status != "pass":
  1513	                logger.warning(
  1514	                    "RAG verification status=%s score=%.3f claims=%d citations=%d reasons=%s",
  1515	                    verification_report.status,
  1516	                    verification_report.score,
  1517	                    verification_report.claim_count,
  1518	                    verification_report.citation_count,
  1519	                    ",".join(verification_report.reasons),
  1520	                )
  1521	
  1522	            try:
  1523	                if asst_msg is None:
  1524	                    raise RuntimeError("assistant message missing before verification update")
  1525	                asst_msg.content = assistant_text
  1526	                asst_msg.citations = citations or None
  1527	                asst_msg.prompt_tokens = int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None
  1528	                asst_msg.output_tokens = int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None
  1529	                await db.commit()
  1530	            except Exception:
  1531	                await db.rollback()
  1532	                yield sse("error", {"code": "PERSIST_FAILED", "message": "Failed to save response"})
  1533	                return
  1534	
  1535	            await _record_rag_verification_event(
  1536	                db,
  1537	                user=user,
  1538	                message_id=getattr(asst_msg, "id", None),
  1539	                verification=verification_payload,
  1540	                retrieval_strategy=retrieval_strategy,
  1541	                query_route=query_route,
  1542	                retrieved_count=len(chunk_map),
  1543	                repair_metadata=repair_metadata,
  1544	            )
  1545	
  1546	            # Credits: reconcile pre-debited estimate against actual cost
  1547	            if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
  1548	                pt = int(prompt_tokens or 0)
  1549	                ct = int(output_tokens or 0)
  1550	                try:
  1551	                    actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(pt, ct, effective_model, mode=effective_mode)
  1552	                    await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
  1553	                        db, user.id, predebit_ledger_id, pre_debited, actual_cost,
  1554	                    )
  1555	                    await credit_service.record_usage(
  1556	                        db,
  1557	                        user_id=user.id,
  1558	                        message_id=asst_msg.id,
  1559	                        model=effective_model,
  1560	                        prompt_tokens=pt,
  1561	                        completion_tokens=ct,
  1562	                        cost_credits=actual_cost,
  1563	                    )
  1564	                    await db.commit()
  1565	                    settled = True
  1566	                except Exception as e:
  1567	                    # Non-fatal accounting error
  1568	                    yield _safe_sse("warn", "ACCOUNTING_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
  1569	
  1570	            # 10) done
  1571	            can_continue = asst_msg.continuation_count < settings.MAX_CONTINUATIONS_PER_MESSAGE
  1572	            done_emitted = True
  1573	            yield sse("done", {
  1574	                "message_id": str(asst_msg.id),
  1575	                "citations_count": len(citations),
  1576	                "verification": verification_payload,
  1577	                "repair": repair_metadata,
  1578	                "can_continue": can_continue and finish_reason == "length",
  1579	                "continuation_count": asst_msg.continuation_count,
  1580	            })
  1581	        except asyncio.CancelledError:
  1582	            raise
  1583	        finally:
  1584	            if not done_emitted:
  1585	                assistant_snapshot = "".join(assistant_text_parts)
  1586	                has_partial_answer = bool(assistant_snapshot.strip())
  1587	                if has_partial_answer and not persisted:
  1588	                    try:
  1589	                        with anyio.CancelScope(shield=True):
  1590	                            await asyncio.wait_for(
  1591	                                _persist_partial_on_cancel(
  1592	                                    session_id=session_id,
  1593	                                    assistant_text=assistant_snapshot,
  1594	                                    citations=citations,
  1595	                                    prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
  1596	                                    output_tokens=output_tokens,
  1597	                                ),
  1598	                                timeout=_CANCEL_IO_TIMEOUT_S,
  1599	                            )
  1600	                        persisted = True
  1601	                    except Exception:
  1602	                        logger.exception(
  1603	                            "Failed to persist partial assistant response on cancel/error for session %s",
  1604	                            session_id,
  1605	                        )
  1606	                if (
  1607	                    user is not None
  1608	                    and pre_debited > 0
  1609	                    and predebit_ledger_id is not None
  1610	                    and not settled
  1611	                ):
  1612	                    try:
  1613	                        with anyio.CancelScope(shield=True):
  1614	                            await asyncio.wait_for(
  1615	                                _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
  1616	                                    user_id=user.id,
  1617	                                    pre_debited=pre_debited,
  1618	                                    predebit_ledger_id=predebit_ledger_id,
  1619	                                    has_answer=has_partial_answer,
  1620	                                    prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
  1621	                                    output_tokens=output_tokens,
  1622	                                    model=effective_model,
  1623	                                    mode=effective_mode,
  1624	                                ),
  1625	                                timeout=_CANCEL_IO_TIMEOUT_S,
  1626	                            )
  1627	                        settled = True
  1628	                    except Exception:
  1629	                        logger.exception(
  1630	                            "Failed to settle pre-debit on cancel/error for user %s",
  1631	                            user.id,
  1632	                        )
  1633	
  1634	    async def continue_stream(
  1635	        self,
  1636	        session_id: uuid.UUID,
  1637	        message_id: Optional[uuid.UUID],
  1638	        db: AsyncSession,
  1639	        user: Optional[User] = None,
  1640	        locale: Optional[str] = None,
  1641	        mode: Optional[str] = None,
  1642	    ) -> AsyncGenerator[Dict[str, Any], None]:
  1643	        """Continue a truncated assistant response, appending to the existing message."""
  1644	
  1645	        # 1) Load session
  1646	        row = await db.execute(select(ChatSession).where(ChatSession.id == session_id))
  1647	        session_obj: Optional[ChatSession] = row.scalar_one_or_none()
  1648	        if not session_obj:
  1649	            yield sse("error", {"code": "SESSION_NOT_FOUND", "message": "Session not found"})
  1650	            return
  1651	
  1652	        document_id = session_obj.document_id
  1653	        collection_id = getattr(session_obj, "collection_id", None)
  1654	        is_collection_session = collection_id is not None and document_id is None
  1655	
  1656	        doc = await db.get(Document, document_id) if document_id else None
  1657	
  1658	        # For collection sessions, load document names
  1659	        collection_doc_names: dict[uuid.UUID, str] = {}
  1660	        if is_collection_session:
  1661	            from app.models.tables import collection_documents as cd_table
  1662	            cd_rows = await db.execute(
  1663	                select(cd_table.c.document_id).where(cd_table.c.collection_id == collection_id)
  1664	            )
  1665	            collection_doc_ids = [r[0] for r in cd_rows.all()]
  1666	            if collection_doc_ids:
  1667	                doc_rows = await db.execute(
  1668	                    select(Document.id, Document.filename).where(Document.id.in_(collection_doc_ids))
  1669	                )
  1670	                for drow in doc_rows.all():
  1671	                    collection_doc_names[drow[0]] = drow[1]
  1672	
  1673	        # 2) Load assistant message to continue
  1674	        if message_id:
  1675	            asst_msg = await db.get(Message, message_id)
  1676	        else:
  1677	            # Fall back to most recent assistant message in session
  1678	            result = await db.execute(
  1679	                select(Message)
  1680	                .where(Message.session_id == session_id, Message.role == "assistant")

diff --git a/backend/tests/test_asst0_cancellation_baseline.py b/backend/tests/test_asst0_cancellation_baseline.py
index e7372a1aa9c0d6fe71c452708d4750a931c9cc6a..913b772b5ea7ff33b140cdcc81fd6e84a025fd54
--- a/backend/tests/test_asst0_cancellation_baseline.py
+++ b/backend/tests/test_asst0_cancellation_baseline.py
@@ -63,6 +63,23 @@
         self.usage = usage
 
 
+class _ScalarsResult:
+    def __init__(self, values):
+        self._values = values
+
+    def scalars(self):
+        values = self._values
+
+        class _Scalars:
+            def __iter__(self):
+                return iter(values)
+
+            def all(self):
+                return values
+
+        return _Scalars()
+
+
 class _SlowStream:
     """Async stream that yields tokens forever until cancelled (lets us suspend mid-stream)."""
 
@@ -77,6 +94,49 @@
             yield _FakeChunk(f"token{i} ")
 
 
+class _FiniteStream:
+    def __init__(self, chunks):
+        self._chunks = chunks
+
+    def __aiter__(self):
+        return self._iterate()
+
+    async def _iterate(self):
+        for chunk in self._chunks:
+            await asyncio.sleep(0)
+            yield chunk
+
+
+class _PartialThenErrorStream:
+    def __init__(self, exc: Exception):
+        self._exc = exc
+
+    def __aiter__(self):
+        return self._iterate()
+
+    async def _iterate(self):
+        await asyncio.sleep(0)
+        yield _FakeChunk("partial ")
+        raise self._exc
+
+
+class _PassVerificationReport:
+    status = "pass"
+    score = 1.0
+    claim_count = 1
+    citation_count = 1
+    reasons = ()
+
+    def to_payload(self):
+        return {
+            "status": "pass",
+            "score": 1.0,

+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_chat_stream_setup_cancel_settles_via_cancel_path(monkeypatch):
+    """CancelledError during setup must still settle pre-debit via cancel-path helper."""
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(4))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=session_id,
+        document_id=document_id,
+        collection_id=None,
+        title=None,
+        domain_mode=None,
+    )
+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            _MessagesResult([SimpleNamespace(role="user", content="What is MetaX?")]),
+        ],
+    )
+    refund, reconcile, record_usage = (AsyncMock() for _ in range(3))
+    persist_store: list = []
+    _patch_common(
+        monkeypatch,
+        ledger_id,
+        document_id,
+        refund=refund,
+        reconcile=reconcile,
+        record_usage=record_usage,
+        persist_store=persist_store,
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.chat_service,
+        "_persist_user_message_and_title",
+        AsyncMock(return_value=None),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.corrective_retrieval_service,
+        "retrieve_single",
+        AsyncMock(side_effect=asyncio.CancelledError()),
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    agen = chat_service_module.chat_service.chat_stream(
+        session_id=session_id,
+        user_message="What is MetaX?",
+        db=db,
+        user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+        mode="quick",
+    ).__aiter__()
+    with pytest.raises(asyncio.CancelledError):
+        await agen.__anext__()
+
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is False
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+
+
+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_continue_stream_setup_cancel_settles_via_cancel_path(monkeypatch):
+    """CancelledError in continuation setup must settle pre-debit in finally."""
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id, message_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(5))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=session_id, document_id=document_id, collection_id=None)
+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    assistant_message = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=message_id,
+        role="assistant",
+        session_id=session_id,
+        citations=[],
+        content="base answer",
+        continuation_count=0,
+        output_tokens=5,
+    )
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        assistant_message=assistant_message,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            asyncio.CancelledError(),
+        ],
+    )
+    refund = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module.credit_service, "get_estimated_cost", lambda _m: 15)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.credit_service,
+        "debit_credits",
+        AsyncMock(return_value=ledger_id),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_refund_predebit", refund)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(completions=SimpleNamespace(create=AsyncMock(return_value=_SlowStream())))
+        ),
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    agen = chat_service_module.chat_service.continue_stream(
+        session_id=session_id,
+        message_id=message_id,
+        db=db,
+        user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+        mode="quick",
+    ).__aiter__()
+    with pytest.raises(asyncio.CancelledError):
+        await agen.__anext__()
+
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is False
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+
+
+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_chat_stream_llm_error_after_partial_answer_does_not_full_refund(monkeypatch):
+    """Partial answer + LLM_ERROR must reconcile in finally, not full-refund early."""
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(4))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=session_id,
+        document_id=document_id,
+        collection_id=None,
+        title=None,
+        domain_mode=None,
+    )
+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            _MessagesResult([SimpleNamespace(role="user", content="What is MetaX?")]),
+        ],
+    )
+    refund, reconcile, record_usage = (AsyncMock() for _ in range(3))
+    persist_store: list = []
+    _patch_common(
+        monkeypatch,
+        ledger_id,
+        document_id,
+        refund=refund,
+        reconcile=reconcile,
+        record_usage=record_usage,
+        persist_store=persist_store,
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(
+                completions=SimpleNamespace(
+                    create=AsyncMock(return_value=_PartialThenErrorStream(RuntimeError("llm failed")))
+                )
+            )
+        ),
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    events = [
+        event
+        async for event in chat_service_module.chat_service.chat_stream(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            user_message="What is MetaX?",
+            db=db,
+            user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+            mode="quick",
+        )
+    ]
+
+    assert events[-1]["event"] == "error"
+    assert events[-1]["data"]["code"] == "LLM_ERROR"
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is True
+
+
+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_continue_stream_llm_error_after_partial_answer_does_not_full_refund(monkeypatch):
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id, message_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(5))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=session_id, document_id=document_id, collection_id=None)
+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    chunk_id = uuid.uuid4()
+    assistant_message = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=message_id,
+        role="assistant",
+        session_id=session_id,
+        citations=[{"chunk_id": str(chunk_id), "ref_index": 1}],
+        content="base answer",
+        continuation_count=0,
+        output_tokens=5,
+    )
+    fake_chunk = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=chunk_id,
+        document_id=document_id,
+        chunk_index=1,
+        page_start=3,
+        page_end=3,
+        bboxes=[],
+        text="MetaX revenue on page 3.",
+        section_title="Section A",
+    )
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        assistant_message=assistant_message,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            _ScalarsResult([fake_chunk]),
+            _MessagesResult([assistant_message]),
+        ],
+    )
+    refund = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module.credit_service, "get_estimated_cost", lambda _m: 15)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.credit_service,
+        "debit_credits",
+        AsyncMock(return_value=ledger_id),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_refund_predebit", refund)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(
+                completions=SimpleNamespace(
+                    create=AsyncMock(return_value=_PartialThenErrorStream(RuntimeError("llm failed")))
+                )
+            )
+        ),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.claim_verifier_service,
+        "verify",
+        lambda *args, **kwargs: _PassVerificationReport(),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module, "AsyncSessionLocal", lambda: _FakePersistSession([])
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    events = [
+        event
+        async for event in chat_service_module.chat_service.continue_stream(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            message_id=message_id,
+            db=db,
+            user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+            mode="quick",
+        )
+    ]
+
+    assert events[-1]["event"] == "error"
+    assert events[-1]["data"]["code"] == "LLM_ERROR"
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is True
+
+
+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_chat_stream_persist_failed_with_partial_answer_does_not_full_refund(monkeypatch):
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(4))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=session_id,
+        document_id=document_id,
+        collection_id=None,
+        title=None,
+        domain_mode=None,
+    )
+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            _MessagesResult([SimpleNamespace(role="user", content="What is MetaX?")]),
+        ],
+    )
+    original_add = db.add
+
+    def fail_on_assistant_add(obj):
+        if isinstance(obj, Message) and getattr(obj, "role", "") == "assistant":
+            raise RuntimeError("persist failed")
+        original_add(obj)
+
+    db.add = fail_on_assistant_add
+    refund, reconcile, record_usage = (AsyncMock() for _ in range(3))
+    persist_store: list = []
+    _patch_common(
+        monkeypatch,
+        ledger_id,
+        document_id,
+        refund=refund,
+        reconcile=reconcile,
+        record_usage=record_usage,
+        persist_store=persist_store,
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(
+                completions=SimpleNamespace(
+                    create=AsyncMock(
+                        return_value=_FiniteStream(
+                            [
+                                _FakeChunk("partial "),
+                                _FakeChunk(
+                                    None,
+                                    finish_reason="stop",
+                                    usage=SimpleNamespace(prompt_tokens=9, completion_tokens=3),
+                                ),
+                            ]
+                        )
+                    )
+                )
+            )
+        ),
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    events = [
+        event
+        async for event in chat_service_module.chat_service.chat_stream(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            user_message="What is MetaX?",
+            db=db,
+            user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+            mode="quick",
+        )
+    ]
+
+    assert events[-1]["event"] == "error"
+    assert events[-1]["data"]["code"] == "PERSIST_FAILED"
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is True
+
+

+

+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is True

@@ -103,6 +103,22 @@
     assert QueryIntent.TABLE_QUERY not in route.intents
 
 
+def test_page_lookup_keeps_table_intent_when_query_mentions_table() -> None:
+    route = query_router.route("show table on page 8")
+
+    assert route.primary_intent == QueryIntent.PAGE_LOOKUP
+    assert route.page_ref == 8
+    assert QueryIntent.TABLE_QUERY in route.intents
+
+
+def test_page_lookup_keeps_comparison_intent_when_query_mentions_comparison() -> None:
+    route = query_router.route("compare revenue on page 5 and page 6")
+
+    assert route.primary_intent == QueryIntent.PAGE_LOOKUP
+    assert route.page_ref == 5
+    assert QueryIntent.COMPARISON in route.intents
+
+
 def test_routes_existence_query_as_exhaustive_scan_candidate() -> None:
     route = query_router.route("Does this contract contain a non-compete clause?", domain_mode="legal")

  2164	                    and pre_debited > 0
  2165	                    and predebit_ledger_id is not None
  2166	                    and not settled
  2167	                ):
  2168	                    try:
  2169	                        with anyio.CancelScope(shield=True):
  2170	                            await asyncio.wait_for(
  2171	                                _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
  2172	                                    user_id=user.id,
  2173	                                    pre_debited=pre_debited,
  2174	                                    predebit_ledger_id=predebit_ledger_id,
  2175	                                    has_answer=has_partial_answer,
  2176	                                    prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
  2177	                                    output_tokens=output_tokens,
  2178	                                    model=effective_model,
  2179	                                    mode=effective_mode,
  2180	                                ),
  2181	                                timeout=_CANCEL_IO_TIMEOUT_S,
  2182	                            )
  2183	                        settled = True
  2184	                    except Exception:
  2185	                        logger.exception(
  2186	                            "Failed to settle continuation pre-debit on cancel/error for user %s",
  2187	                            user.id,
  2188	                        )
  2189	
  2190	
  2191	# Singleton service
  2192	chat_service = ChatService()

diff --git a/backend/tests/test_asst0_cancellation_baseline.py b/backend/tests/test_asst0_cancellation_baseline.py
index e7372a1aa9c0d6fe71c452708d4750a931c9cc6a..913b772b5ea7ff33b140cdcc81fd6e84a025fd54
--- a/backend/tests/test_asst0_cancellation_baseline.py
+++ b/backend/tests/test_asst0_cancellation_baseline.py
@@ -63,6 +63,23 @@
         self.usage = usage
 
 
+class _ScalarsResult:
+    def __init__(self, values):
+        self._values = values
+
+    def scalars(self):
+        values = self._values
+
+        class _Scalars:
+            def __iter__(self):
+                return iter(values)
+
+            def all(self):
+                return values
+
+        return _Scalars()
+
+
 class _SlowStream:
     """Async stream that yields tokens forever until cancelled (lets us suspend mid-stream)."""
 
@@ -77,6 +94,49 @@
             yield _FakeChunk(f"token{i} ")
 
 
+class _FiniteStream:
+    def __init__(self, chunks):
+        self._chunks = chunks
+
+    def __aiter__(self):
+        return self._iterate()
+
+    async def _iterate(self):
+        for chunk in self._chunks:
+            await asyncio.sleep(0)
+            yield chunk
+
+
+class _PartialThenErrorStream:
+    def __init__(self, exc: Exception):
+        self._exc = exc
+
+    def __aiter__(self):
+        return self._iterate()
+
+    async def _iterate(self):
+        await asyncio.sleep(0)
+        yield _FakeChunk("partial ")
+        raise self._exc
+
+
+class _PassVerificationReport:
+    status = "pass"
+    score = 1.0
+    claim_count = 1
+    citation_count = 1
+    reasons = ()
+
+    def to_payload(self):
+        return {
+            "status": "pass",
+            "score": 1.0,
+            "claim_count": 1,
+            "citation_count": 1,
+            "reasons": [],
+        }
+
+
 class _FakePersistSession:
     """Stand-in for the INDEPENDENT AsyncSessionLocal the cancel path opens.
 
@@ -290,3 +350,602 @@
     assert settled >= 1, (
         "asst=0 CREDIT LEAK (continue_stream): pre-debit not settled after mid-stream cancel."
     )
+
+
+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_chat_stream_setup_cancel_settles_via_cancel_path(monkeypatch):
+    """CancelledError during setup must still settle pre-debit via cancel-path helper."""
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(4))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=session_id,
+        document_id=document_id,
+        collection_id=None,
+        title=None,
+        domain_mode=None,
+    )
+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            _MessagesResult([SimpleNamespace(role="user", content="What is MetaX?")]),
+        ],
+    )
+    refund, reconcile, record_usage = (AsyncMock() for _ in range(3))
+    persist_store: list = []
+    _patch_common(
+        monkeypatch,
+        ledger_id,
+        document_id,
+        refund=refund,
+        reconcile=reconcile,
+        record_usage=record_usage,
+        persist_store=persist_store,
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.chat_service,
+        "_persist_user_message_and_title",
+        AsyncMock(return_value=None),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.corrective_retrieval_service,
+        "retrieve_single",
+        AsyncMock(side_effect=asyncio.CancelledError()),
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    agen = chat_service_module.chat_service.chat_stream(
+        session_id=session_id,
+        user_message="What is MetaX?",
+        db=db,
+        user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+        mode="quick",
+    ).__aiter__()
+    with pytest.raises(asyncio.CancelledError):
+        await agen.__anext__()
+
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is False
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+
+
+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_continue_stream_setup_cancel_settles_via_cancel_path(monkeypatch):
+    """CancelledError in continuation setup must settle pre-debit in finally."""
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id, message_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(5))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=session_id, document_id=document_id, collection_id=None)
+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    assistant_message = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=message_id,
+        role="assistant",
+        session_id=session_id,
+        citations=[],
+        content="base answer",
+        continuation_count=0,
+        output_tokens=5,
+    )
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        assistant_message=assistant_message,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            asyncio.CancelledError(),
+        ],
+    )
+    refund = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module.credit_service, "get_estimated_cost", lambda _m: 15)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.credit_service,
+        "debit_credits",
+        AsyncMock(return_value=ledger_id),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_refund_predebit", refund)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(completions=SimpleNamespace(create=AsyncMock(return_value=_SlowStream())))
+        ),
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    agen = chat_service_module.chat_service.continue_stream(
+        session_id=session_id,
+        message_id=message_id,
+        db=db,
+        user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+        mode="quick",
+    ).__aiter__()
+    with pytest.raises(asyncio.CancelledError):
+        await agen.__anext__()
+
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is False
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+
+
+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_chat_stream_llm_error_after_partial_answer_does_not_full_refund(monkeypatch):
+    """Partial answer + LLM_ERROR must reconcile in finally, not full-refund early."""
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(4))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=session_id,
+        document_id=document_id,
+        collection_id=None,
+        title=None,
+        domain_mode=None,
+    )
+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            _MessagesResult([SimpleNamespace(role="user", content="What is MetaX?")]),
+        ],
+    )
+    refund, reconcile, record_usage = (AsyncMock() for _ in range(3))
+    persist_store: list = []
+    _patch_common(
+        monkeypatch,
+        ledger_id,
+        document_id,
+        refund=refund,
+        reconcile=reconcile,
+        record_usage=record_usage,
+        persist_store=persist_store,
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(
+                completions=SimpleNamespace(
+                    create=AsyncMock(return_value=_PartialThenErrorStream(RuntimeError("llm failed")))
+                )
+            )
+        ),
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    events = [
+        event
+        async for event in chat_service_module.chat_service.chat_stream(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            user_message="What is MetaX?",
+            db=db,
+            user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+            mode="quick",
+        )
+    ]
+
+    assert events[-1]["event"] == "error"
+    assert events[-1]["data"]["code"] == "LLM_ERROR"
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is True
+
+
+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_continue_stream_llm_error_after_partial_answer_does_not_full_refund(monkeypatch):
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id, message_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(5))

+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    chunk_id = uuid.uuid4()
+    assistant_message = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=message_id,
+        role="assistant",
+        session_id=session_id,
+        citations=[{"chunk_id": str(chunk_id), "ref_index": 1}],
+        content="base answer",
+        continuation_count=0,
+        output_tokens=5,
+    )
+    fake_chunk = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=chunk_id,
+        document_id=document_id,
+        chunk_index=1,
+        page_start=3,
+        page_end=3,
+        bboxes=[],
+        text="MetaX revenue on page 3.",
+        section_title="Section A",
+    )
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        assistant_message=assistant_message,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            _ScalarsResult([fake_chunk]),
+            _MessagesResult([assistant_message]),
+        ],
+    )
+    refund = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module.credit_service, "get_estimated_cost", lambda _m: 15)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.credit_service,
+        "debit_credits",
+        AsyncMock(return_value=ledger_id),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_refund_predebit", refund)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(
+                completions=SimpleNamespace(
+                    create=AsyncMock(return_value=_PartialThenErrorStream(RuntimeError("llm failed")))
+                )
+            )
+        ),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.claim_verifier_service,
+        "verify",
+        lambda *args, **kwargs: _PassVerificationReport(),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module, "AsyncSessionLocal", lambda: _FakePersistSession([])
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    events = [
+        event
+        async for event in chat_service_module.chat_service.continue_stream(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            message_id=message_id,
+            db=db,
+            user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+            mode="quick",
+        )
+    ]
+
+    assert events[-1]["event"] == "error"
+    assert events[-1]["data"]["code"] == "LLM_ERROR"
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is True
+

+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_chat_stream_persist_failed_with_partial_answer_does_not_full_refund(monkeypatch):
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(4))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=session_id,
+        document_id=document_id,
+        collection_id=None,
+        title=None,
+        domain_mode=None,
+    )

+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            _MessagesResult([SimpleNamespace(role="user", content="What is MetaX?")]),
+        ],
+    )
+    original_add = db.add
+
+    def fail_on_assistant_add(obj):
+        if isinstance(obj, Message) and getattr(obj, "role", "") == "assistant":
+            raise RuntimeError("persist failed")
+        original_add(obj)
+
+    db.add = fail_on_assistant_add
+    refund, reconcile, record_usage = (AsyncMock() for _ in range(3))
+    persist_store: list = []
+    _patch_common(
+        monkeypatch,
+        ledger_id,
+        document_id,
+        refund=refund,
+        reconcile=reconcile,
+        record_usage=record_usage,
+        persist_store=persist_store,
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(
+                completions=SimpleNamespace(
+                    create=AsyncMock(
+                        return_value=_FiniteStream(
+                            [
+                                _FakeChunk("partial "),
+                                _FakeChunk(
+                                    None,
+                                    finish_reason="stop",
+                                    usage=SimpleNamespace(prompt_tokens=9, completion_tokens=3),
+                                ),
+                            ]
+                        )
+                    )
+                )
+            )
+        ),
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    events = [
+        event
+        async for event in chat_service_module.chat_service.chat_stream(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            user_message="What is MetaX?",
+            db=db,
+            user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+            mode="quick",
+        )
+    ]
+
+    assert events[-1]["event"] == "error"
+    assert events[-1]["data"]["code"] == "PERSIST_FAILED"
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is True
+
+

+        chat_service_module.claim_verifier_service,
+        "verify",
+        lambda *args, **kwargs: _PassVerificationReport(),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(
+                completions=SimpleNamespace(
+                    create=AsyncMock(
+                        return_value=_FiniteStream(
+                            [
+                                _FakeChunk("continued "),
+                                _FakeChunk(
+                                    None,
+                                    finish_reason="length",
+                                    usage=SimpleNamespace(prompt_tokens=8, completion_tokens=3),
+                                ),
+                            ]
+                        )
+                    )
+                )
+            )
+        ),
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    events = [
+        event
+        async for event in chat_service_module.chat_service.continue_stream(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            message_id=message_id,
+            db=db,
+            user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+            mode="quick",
+        )
+    ]
+
+    assert any(e["event"] == "warn" and e["data"]["code"] == "ACCOUNTING_ERROR" for e in events)
+    assert events[-1]["event"] == "done"
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is True

diff --git a/backend/tests/test_asst0_cancellation_baseline.py b/backend/tests/test_asst0_cancellation_baseline.py
index e7372a1aa9c0d6fe71c452708d4750a931c9cc6a..913b772b5ea7ff33b140cdcc81fd6e84a025fd54
--- a/backend/tests/test_asst0_cancellation_baseline.py
+++ b/backend/tests/test_asst0_cancellation_baseline.py
@@ -63,6 +63,23 @@
         self.usage = usage
 
 
+class _ScalarsResult:
+    def __init__(self, values):
+        self._values = values
+
+    def scalars(self):
+        values = self._values
+
+        class _Scalars:
+            def __iter__(self):
+                return iter(values)
+
+            def all(self):
+                return values
+
+        return _Scalars()
+
+
 class _SlowStream:
     """Async stream that yields tokens forever until cancelled (lets us suspend mid-stream)."""
 
@@ -77,6 +94,49 @@
             yield _FakeChunk(f"token{i} ")
 
 
+class _FiniteStream:
+    def __init__(self, chunks):
+        self._chunks = chunks
+
+    def __aiter__(self):
+        return self._iterate()
+
+    async def _iterate(self):
+        for chunk in self._chunks:
+            await asyncio.sleep(0)
+            yield chunk
+
+
+class _PartialThenErrorStream:
+    def __init__(self, exc: Exception):
+        self._exc = exc
+
+    def __aiter__(self):
+        return self._iterate()
+
+    async def _iterate(self):
+        await asyncio.sleep(0)
+        yield _FakeChunk("partial ")
+        raise self._exc
+
+
+class _PassVerificationReport:
+    status = "pass"
+    score = 1.0
+    claim_count = 1
+    citation_count = 1
+    reasons = ()
+
+    def to_payload(self):
+        return {
+            "status": "pass",
+            "score": 1.0,
+            "claim_count": 1,
+            "citation_count": 1,
+            "reasons": [],
+        }
+
+

+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_chat_stream_setup_cancel_settles_via_cancel_path(monkeypatch):
+    """CancelledError during setup must still settle pre-debit via cancel-path helper."""
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(4))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=session_id,
+        document_id=document_id,
+        collection_id=None,
+        title=None,
+        domain_mode=None,
+    )
+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            _MessagesResult([SimpleNamespace(role="user", content="What is MetaX?")]),
+        ],
+    )
+    refund, reconcile, record_usage = (AsyncMock() for _ in range(3))
+    persist_store: list = []
+    _patch_common(
+        monkeypatch,
+        ledger_id,
+        document_id,
+        refund=refund,
+        reconcile=reconcile,
+        record_usage=record_usage,
+        persist_store=persist_store,
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.chat_service,
+        "_persist_user_message_and_title",
+        AsyncMock(return_value=None),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.corrective_retrieval_service,
+        "retrieve_single",
+        AsyncMock(side_effect=asyncio.CancelledError()),
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    agen = chat_service_module.chat_service.chat_stream(
+        session_id=session_id,
+        user_message="What is MetaX?",
+        db=db,
+        user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+        mode="quick",
+    ).__aiter__()
+    with pytest.raises(asyncio.CancelledError):
+        await agen.__anext__()
+
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is False
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+
+
+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_continue_stream_setup_cancel_settles_via_cancel_path(monkeypatch):
+    """CancelledError in continuation setup must settle pre-debit in finally."""
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id, message_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(5))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=session_id, document_id=document_id, collection_id=None)
+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    assistant_message = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=message_id,
+        role="assistant",
+        session_id=session_id,
+        citations=[],
+        content="base answer",
+        continuation_count=0,
+        output_tokens=5,
+    )
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        assistant_message=assistant_message,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            asyncio.CancelledError(),
+        ],
+    )
+    refund = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module.credit_service, "get_estimated_cost", lambda _m: 15)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.credit_service,
+        "debit_credits",
+        AsyncMock(return_value=ledger_id),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_refund_predebit", refund)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(completions=SimpleNamespace(create=AsyncMock(return_value=_SlowStream())))
+        ),
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    agen = chat_service_module.chat_service.continue_stream(
+        session_id=session_id,
+        message_id=message_id,
+        db=db,
+        user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+        mode="quick",
+    ).__aiter__()
+    with pytest.raises(asyncio.CancelledError):
+        await agen.__anext__()
+
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is False
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+
+
+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_chat_stream_llm_error_after_partial_answer_does_not_full_refund(monkeypatch):
+    """Partial answer + LLM_ERROR must reconcile in finally, not full-refund early."""
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(4))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=session_id,
+        document_id=document_id,
+        collection_id=None,
+        title=None,
+        domain_mode=None,
+    )
+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            _MessagesResult([SimpleNamespace(role="user", content="What is MetaX?")]),
+        ],
+    )
+    refund, reconcile, record_usage = (AsyncMock() for _ in range(3))
+    persist_store: list = []
+    _patch_common(
+        monkeypatch,
+        ledger_id,
+        document_id,
+        refund=refund,
+        reconcile=reconcile,
+        record_usage=record_usage,
+        persist_store=persist_store,
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(
+                completions=SimpleNamespace(
+                    create=AsyncMock(return_value=_PartialThenErrorStream(RuntimeError("llm failed")))
+                )
+            )
+        ),
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    events = [
+        event
+        async for event in chat_service_module.chat_service.chat_stream(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            user_message="What is MetaX?",
+            db=db,
+            user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+            mode="quick",
+        )
+    ]
+
+    assert events[-1]["event"] == "error"
+    assert events[-1]["data"]["code"] == "LLM_ERROR"
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is True
+
+
+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_continue_stream_llm_error_after_partial_answer_does_not_full_refund(monkeypatch):
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id, message_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(5))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=session_id, document_id=document_id, collection_id=None)
+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    chunk_id = uuid.uuid4()
+    assistant_message = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=message_id,
+        role="assistant",
+        session_id=session_id,
+        citations=[{"chunk_id": str(chunk_id), "ref_index": 1}],
+        content="base answer",
+        continuation_count=0,
+        output_tokens=5,
+    )
+    fake_chunk = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=chunk_id,
+        document_id=document_id,
+        chunk_index=1,
+        page_start=3,
+        page_end=3,
+        bboxes=[],
+        text="MetaX revenue on page 3.",
+        section_title="Section A",
+    )
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        assistant_message=assistant_message,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            _ScalarsResult([fake_chunk]),
+            _MessagesResult([assistant_message]),
+        ],
+    )
+    refund = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module.credit_service, "get_estimated_cost", lambda _m: 15)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.credit_service,
+        "debit_credits",
+        AsyncMock(return_value=ledger_id),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_refund_predebit", refund)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(
+                completions=SimpleNamespace(
+                    create=AsyncMock(return_value=_PartialThenErrorStream(RuntimeError("llm failed")))
+                )
+            )
+        ),

+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.claim_verifier_service,

+        lambda *args, **kwargs: _PassVerificationReport(),

+

+            db=db,
+            user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+            mode="quick",

+
+    assert events[-1]["event"] == "error"
+    assert events[-1]["data"]["code"] == "LLM_ERROR"
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is True
+
+
+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_chat_stream_persist_failed_with_partial_answer_does_not_full_refund(monkeypatch):
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(4))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=session_id,
+        document_id=document_id,
+        collection_id=None,
+        title=None,
+        domain_mode=None,
+    )
+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            _MessagesResult([SimpleNamespace(role="user", content="What is MetaX?")]),
+        ],
+    )
+    original_add = db.add
+
+    def fail_on_assistant_add(obj):
+        if isinstance(obj, Message) and getattr(obj, "role", "") == "assistant":
+            raise RuntimeError("persist failed")
+        original_add(obj)
+
+    db.add = fail_on_assistant_add
+    refund, reconcile, record_usage = (AsyncMock() for _ in range(3))
+    persist_store: list = []
+    _patch_common(
+        monkeypatch,
+        ledger_id,
+        document_id,
+        refund=refund,
+        reconcile=reconcile,
+        record_usage=record_usage,
+        persist_store=persist_store,
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(
+                completions=SimpleNamespace(
+                    create=AsyncMock(
+                        return_value=_FiniteStream(
+                            [
+                                _FakeChunk("partial "),
+                                _FakeChunk(
+                                    None,
+                                    finish_reason="stop",
+                                    usage=SimpleNamespace(prompt_tokens=9, completion_tokens=3),
+                                ),
+                            ]
+                        )
+                    )
+                )
+            )
+        ),
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    events = [
+        event
+        async for event in chat_service_module.chat_service.chat_stream(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            user_message="What is MetaX?",
+            db=db,
+            user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+            mode="quick",
+        )
+    ]
+
+    assert events[-1]["event"] == "error"
+    assert events[-1]["data"]["code"] == "PERSIST_FAILED"
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is True
+
+
+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_continue_stream_persist_failed_with_partial_answer_does_not_full_refund(monkeypatch):
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id, message_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(5))
+    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=session_id, document_id=document_id, collection_id=None)
+    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
+    assistant_message = SimpleNamespace(
+        id=message_id,
+        role="assistant",
+        session_id=session_id,
+        citations=[],
+        content="base answer",
+        continuation_count=0,
+        output_tokens=5,
+    )
+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        assistant_message=assistant_message,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            _MessagesResult([assistant_message]),
+        ],
+    )
+    db.commit = AsyncMock(side_effect=[None, RuntimeError("persist failed")])
+
+    refund = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module.credit_service, "get_estimated_cost", lambda _m: 15)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.credit_service,
+        "debit_credits",
+        AsyncMock(return_value=ledger_id),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_refund_predebit", refund)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(
+                completions=SimpleNamespace(
+                    create=AsyncMock(
+                        return_value=_FiniteStream(
+                            [
+                                _FakeChunk("continued "),
+                                _FakeChunk(
+                                    None,
+                                    finish_reason="length",
+                                    usage=SimpleNamespace(prompt_tokens=7, completion_tokens=2),
+                                ),
+                            ]
+                        )
+                    )
+                )
+            )
+        ),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module.claim_verifier_service,
+        "verify",
+        lambda *args, **kwargs: _PassVerificationReport(),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module, "AsyncSessionLocal", lambda: _FakePersistSession([])
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    events = [
+        event
+        async for event in chat_service_module.chat_service.continue_stream(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            message_id=message_id,
+            db=db,
+            user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+            mode="quick",
+        )
+    ]
+
+    assert events[-1]["event"] == "error"
+    assert events[-1]["data"]["code"] == "PERSIST_FAILED"
+    assert refund.await_count == 0
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_count == 1
+    assert settle_on_cancel.await_args.kwargs["has_answer"] is True
+
+
+@pytest.mark.asyncio
+async def test_chat_stream_accounting_error_still_runs_fallback_settlement(monkeypatch):
+    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(4))

+        id=session_id,
+        document_id=document_id,
+        collection_id=None,
+        title=None,

+    db = _make_db(
+        session_obj,
+        doc_obj,
+        execute_side_effect=[
+            _ScalarOneResult(session_obj),
+            _MessagesResult([SimpleNamespace(role="user", content="What is MetaX?")]),
+        ],
+    )
+    refund, reconcile, record_usage = (AsyncMock() for _ in range(3))
+    reconcile.side_effect = RuntimeError("acct fail")

+        monkeypatch,
+        ledger_id,
+        document_id,
+        refund=refund,
+        reconcile=reconcile,
+        record_usage=record_usage,
+        persist_store=persist_store,
+    )

+        chat_service_module.claim_verifier_service,
+        "verify",
+        lambda *args, **kwargs: _PassVerificationReport(),
+    )
+    monkeypatch.setattr(
+        chat_service_module,
+        "_get_llm_client",
+        lambda _m: SimpleNamespace(
+            chat=SimpleNamespace(
+                completions=SimpleNamespace(
+                    create=AsyncMock(
+                        return_value=_FiniteStream(
+                            [
+                                _FakeChunk("answer "),
+                                _FakeChunk(
+                                    None,
+                                    finish_reason="length",
+                                    usage=SimpleNamespace(prompt_tokens=10, completion_tokens=4),
+                                ),
+                            ]
+                        )
+                    )
+                )
+            )
+        ),
+    )
+    settle_on_cancel = AsyncMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(chat_service_module, "_settle_predebit_on_cancel", settle_on_cancel)
+
+    events = [
+        event
+        async for event in chat_service_module.chat_service.chat_stream(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            user_message="What is MetaX?",
+            db=db,
+            user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan="pro"),
+            mode="quick",
+        )
